summary: Win Wall section frontend testing completed successfully. All 3 versions (US, Belgium EN, Belgium FR) work correctly with proper localization, currency, cities, and translations.
critical_code_review_comments: WinWallSection.js is well-structured with clean content separation for US/BE-EN/BE-FR versions
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Live counter animations work correctly with green flash effect
Carousel auto-rotation (4.5s interval) and dot click navigation work properly
test_credentials: N/A - Win Wall is public, no auth required
seed_data_creation: None - Win Wall uses static data with live counter animations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Win Wall section fully tested. All 3 versions work correctly. Carousel auto-rotates every 4.5s. Live counters increment (Total Saved every 3.5s, Cases Won every 5s with 60% probability). CTA button navigates to /login for unauthenticated users (expected behavior).
